sentences.arabic: يُمَثِّلُ التَّوَكُّلُ عَلَى اللَّهِ ثَمَرَةً مِنْ ثِمَارِ الْعَقِيدَةِ الصَّحِيحَةِ، وَهُوَ الِاعْتِمَادُ بِالْقَلْبِ عَلَى اللَّهِ مَعَ الْأَخْذِ بِالْأَسْبَابِ الْمُمْكِنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Oslonac na Allaha (tevekkul) predstavlja plod ispravnog vjerovanja, a to je oslanjanje srcem na Allaha uz poduzimanje mogućih uzroka.
sentences.translationEn: Reliance on Allah (Tawakkul) represents a fruit of correct creed; it is the heart's dependence on Allah while taking possible means.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ ثَبَتَ فِي الصَّحِيحِ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ كَانَ يَقُولُ فِي دُعَائِهِ: «اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ أَسْلَمْتُ، وَبِكَ آمَنْتُ، وَعَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْتُ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ التَّهَجُّدِ].
sentences.translation: U Sahihu je potvrđeno da je Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, u svojoj dovi govorio: 'Allahu moj, Tebi sam se predao, u Tebe sam povjerovao i na Tebe se oslonio' [Buhari].
sentences.translationEn: It is established in the Sahih that the Prophet ﷺ used to say in his supplication: 'O Allah, to You I have submitted, in You I have believed, and upon You I have relied' [Reported by al-Bukhari].

sentences.arabic: وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّيْخُ ابْنُ بَازٍ أَنَّ التَّوَكُّلَ لَا يَعْنِي تَرْكَ الْعَمَلِ أَوْ التَّكَاسُلَ، بَلْ هُوَ السَّعْيُ الْجَادُّ مَعَ الْيَقِينِ بِأَنَّ النَّتَائِجَ بِيَدِ الْخَالِقِ سُبْحَانَهُ.
sentences.translation: Šejh Ibn Baz pojašnjava da tevekkul ne znači ostavljanje rada ili lijenost, već je to ozbiljan trud uz ubjeđenje da su rezultati u rukama Stvoritelja, slavljen neka je On.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh Ibn Baz explains that reliance does not mean abandoning work or being lazy; rather, it is serious striving with the certainty that the results are in the hands of the Creator, glorified be He.

sentences.arabic: فَالْمُتَوَكِّلُ الْحَقِيقِيُّ يَسْكُنُ قَلْبُهُ وَيَطْمَئِنُّ لِقَضَاءِ اللَّهِ، لِأَنَّهُ يَعْلَمُ أَنَّ مَا أَصَابَهُ لَمْ يَكُنْ لِيُخْطِئَهُ.
sentences.translation: Onome ko se istinski oslanja na Allaha srce je smireno i spokojno spram Allahove odredbe, jer zna da ga ono što ga je zadesilo nije moglo mimoići.
sentences.translationEn: The true reliant person's heart is calm and reassured by Allah's decree, because he knows that what befell him could not have missed him.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّوَازُنُ بَيْنَ الْجُهْدِ الْبَدَنِيِّ وَالتَّسْلِيمِ الْقَلْبِيِّ هُوَ جَوْهَرُ الْعِبَادَةِ وَطَرِيقُ النَّجَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova ravnoteža između fizičkog truda i srčane predanosti je srž ibadeta i put spasa.
sentences.translationEn: This balance between physical effort and spiritual submission is the essence of worship and the path to salvation.

sentences.arabic: وَمَنْ تَوَكَّلَ عَلَى اللَّهِ كَفَاهُ هَمَّهُ وَيَسَّرَ لَهُ أَمْرَهُ.
sentences.translation: Ko se osloni na Allaha, On mu je dovoljan u njegovim brigama i olakša mu njegove poslove.
sentences.translationEn: Whoever relies on Allah, He will suffice him in his concerns and ease his affairs.
